Description: Verify user can login with correct username and password
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Login page 2. Enter valid username and password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: User is authenticated and redirected to Dashboard with session cookie created

Description: Verify login fails with incorrect password
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Login page 2. Enter valid username but wrong password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Invalid username or password

Description: Verify login fails with non-existent username
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Login page 2. Enter non-existent username 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Error message: Invalid username or password

Description: Verify login fails when fields are empty
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Login page 2. Leave username and password blank 3. Click Login
Expected Result: Login button disabled or validation error shown

Test Case: Login with email instead of username
Description: Verify user can login using email address
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Login page 2. Enter registered email and password 3. Click Login
Expected Result: User authenticated successfully using email as identifier

Description: Verify user session is invalidated on logout
Test Procedure: 1. Login with valid credentials 2. Click Logout button
Expected Result: User redirected to Login page and session cookie cleared

Description: Verify session remains active across page navigation
Test Procedure: 1. Login successfully 2. Navigate to different pages 3. Check /api/me
Expected Result: User remains authenticated across all page navigations

Description: Verify 2FA setup generates QR code and secret
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile page 2. Click Enable 2FA
Expected Result: QR code displayed with otpauth URL and secret key shown

Description: Verify 2FA is enabled after entering correct TOTP code
Test Procedure: 1. Setup 2FA and scan QR code 2. Enter 6-digit code from authenticator 3. Click Verify and Enable
Expected Result: 2FA enabled successfully and status changes to Enabled

Description: Verify 2FA rejects incorrect TOTP code
Test Procedure: 1. Setup 2FA 2. Enter wrong 6-digit code 3. Click Verify and Enable
Expected Result: Error message: Invalid verification code

Description: Verify 2FA can be disabled with correct code
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile with 2FA enabled 2. Click Disable 2FA 3. Enter valid TOTP code 4. Confirm
Expected Result: 2FA disabled successfully and status changes to Disabled

Description: Verify login requires TOTP code when 2FA is enabled
Test Procedure: 1. Enter valid username and password 2. System prompts for 2FA code 3. Enter valid TOTP code
Test Data: Username: user1, Password: pass123, TOTP: valid code
Expected Result: Login successful after both password and 2FA verification

Description: Verify login fails with incorrect TOTP code
Test Procedure: 1. Enter valid username and password 2. System prompts for 2FA code 3. Enter wrong TOTP code
Expected Result: Error message: Invalid 2FA code and login denied

Description: Verify temporary 2FA token expires after 5 minutes
Test Procedure: 1. Login with password (2FA enabled) 2. Wait more than 5 minutes 3. Enter valid TOTP code
Expected Result: Error: token expired and user must re-enter password

Description: Verify email update works from Profile page
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Enter new email 3. Click Save Changes
Expected Result: Email updated successfully with success message

Description: Verify system rejects empty email
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Clear email field 3. Click Save Changes
Expected Result: Error message: Email cannot be empty

Description: Verify system rejects email already used by another user
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Enter email of another user 3. Click Save Changes
Expected Result: Error message: Email already in use

Description: Verify password change with correct current password
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Enter current password 3. Enter new password and confirm 4. Click Save Changes
Test Data: Current: admin123, New: newpass123, Confirm: newpass123
Expected Result: Password changed successfully

Test Case: Change password with wrong current password
Description: Verify password change fails with incorrect current password
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Enter wrong current password 3. Enter new password 4. Click Save Changes
Test Data: Current: wrongpass, New: newpass123, Confirm: newpass123
Expected Result: Error message: Current password is incorrect

Description: Verify validation when new password and confirm do not match
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Enter current password 3. Enter mismatched passwords 4. Click Save Changes
Test Data: Current: admin123, New: pass1, Confirm: pass2
Expected Result: Error message: Passwords do not match

Description: Verify system rejects password shorter than minimum length
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Profile 2. Enter valid current password 3. Enter short new password 4. Click Save Changes
Test Data: Current: admin123, New: ab, Confirm: ab
Expected Result: Error message: Password must be at least 6 characters

Description: Verify customer creation submits successfully
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Customers > Add Customer 2. Fill in all required fields 3. Click Submit
Test Data: FirstName: John, LastName: Doe, Email: john@test.com, ID: 123456789012, Phone: +60123456789, Gender: Male, Nationality: Malaysian, DOB: 1990-01-01, Employment: Employed, Income: 50000, Address: 123 Main St
Expected Result: Pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify validation rejects invalid email format
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Add Customer 2. Enter invalid email 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: Email must be a valid email address

Test Case: Create customer with missing required fields
Description: Verify validation rejects incomplete form
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Add Customer 2. Leave First Name empty 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error for missing required fields

Description: Verify validation rejects customer under 18
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Add Customer 2. Enter DOB making customer under 18 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: Customer must be at least 18 years old

Description: Verify system rejects duplicate customer email
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Add Customer 2. Enter email already used by another customer 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: Email already in use

Description: Verify customer edit creates UPDATE pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Customers 2. View customer 3. Click Edit 4. Modify fields 5. Submit
Expected Result: UPDATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify deactivation creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Customers 2. View active customer 3. Click Deactivate
Expected Result: DEACTIVATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify activation creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Customers 2. View inactive customer 3. Click Activate
Expected Result: ACTIVATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify search filters customers by name
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Customers 2. Enter name in search box
Expected Result: Only customers with name containing John displayed

Description: Verify filter narrows customer list by status
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Customers 2. Select status filter Active
Expected Result: Only customers with ACTIVE status displayed

Description: Verify account creation submits successfully
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Accounts > Add Account 2. Select customer 3. Fill details 4. Submit
Test Data: Customer ID: 1, Currency: USD, Balance: 0, Credit Limit: 10000, Billing Cycle: 1st of Month, Interest Rate: 18.0
Expected Result: Pending request created and account number auto-generated as 10 digits

Description: Verify validation requires customer selection
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Add Account 2. Leave customer unselected 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: Customer is required

Description: Verify account edit creates UPDATE pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Accounts 2. View account 3. Edit 4. Modify credit limit 5. Submit
Expected Result: UPDATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify account activation creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Accounts 2. View inactive account 3. Click Activate
Expected Result: ACTIVATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify account deactivation creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Accounts 2. View active account 3. Click Deactivate
Expected Result: DEACTIVATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify card creation submits successfully
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards > Add Card 2. Select account 3. Fill details 4. Submit
Test Data: Account ID: 1, Card Type: Gold, Brand: VISA, Mode: PHYSICAL, Holder: John Doe
Expected Result: Pending request created with card number and CVV auto-generated

Description: Verify validation requires account selection
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Add Card 2. Leave account unselected 3. Submit
Expected Result: Validation error: Account is required

Description: Verify card activation creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards 2. View inactive card 3. Click Activate
Expected Result: ACTIVATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify card blocking requires reason
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards 2. View active card 3. Click Block 4. Enter reason
Expected Result: BLOCK pending request created with reason stored

Description: Verify card issuance creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards 2. View inactive card 3. Click Issue
Expected Result: ISSUE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify card replacement creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards 2. View active card 3. Click Replace
Expected Result: REPLACE pending request created. When approved old card marked REPLACED and new card created

Description: Verify card deactivation creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards 2. View active card 3. Click Deactivate
Expected Result: DEACTIVATE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify card deletion creates pending request
Test Procedure: 1. Navigate to Cards 2. View card 3. Click Delete
Expected Result: DELETE pending request created with status PENDING

Description: Verify dashboard shows correct summary counts
Test Procedure: 1. Login as Staff or Manager 2. Navigate to Dashboard
Expected Result: Dashboard displays total customers and active accounts and active cards and pending requests

Description: Verify chatbot returns relevant response
Test Procedure: 1. Open chat widget 2. Type message 3. Send
Test Data: Message: How many customers do we have?
Expected Result: Chatbot returns response with accurate customer count from live data

Description: Verify chatbot restricted to Staff and Manager only
Test Procedure: 1. Login as Admin 2. Attempt to access /api/chat
Expected Result: 403 Forbidden returned

Description: Verify clear chat removes conversation history
Test Procedure: 1. Open chat widget 2. Send a few messages 3. Click clear button
Expected Result: All messages cleared and welcome message shown

Test Case: Admin create user with valid data
Description: Verify Admin can create system users
Test Procedure: 1. Login as Admin 2. Navigate to Roles 3. Fill username email password role 4. Click Create
Test Data: Username: newstaff, Email: staff@test.com, Password: pass123, Role: STAFF
Expected Result: User created successfully and appears in user list

Test Case: Admin create user with missing fields
Description: Verify validation rejects incomplete user creation
Test Procedure: 1. Login as Admin 2. Navigate to Roles 3. Leave fields empty 4. Click Create
Expected Result: Validation error: Please fill in all fields before creating a user
